# llms.txt for grona.ai
# This file provides information about the website for AI language models and crawlers

# Site Information
Site: https://grona.ai
Name: Grona.ai
Description: Agentic CRO (Conversion Rate Optimization) platform that uses AI chat to run conversion optimization and personalization without visual editors or CRO consultants.

# Main Pages
Pages:
- https://grona.ai/
- https://grona.ai/features
- https://grona.ai/pricing
- https://grona.ai/blog
- https://grona.ai/how_it_works.html

# Company Information
Company: Grona.ai
Tagline: Agentic CRO that actually ships
Mission: Enable websites to self-optimize through AI-powered conversion optimization and personalization

# Key Features
Features:
- AI-powered conversion optimization
- Conversational CRO assistant
- Automated personalization
- Visual editor for manual control
- Quality checks and safety features
- Real-time optimization

# Technology
Technology: AI, Machine Learning, Conversion Rate Optimization, A/B Testing, Personalization

# Contact
Support: Email support available
Documentation: https://grona.ai/docs
